concerns.detail: Unsupported character judgment ('mean') without reference to specific advising behaviors; constitutes a pure personal insult
Vulgar personal attack employing sexualized language ('意淫') and violent imagery ('逼死'), constituting flame-war content rather than criticism of concrete practices
concerns.excerpt: sp意淫你师姐开心还是逼死组里实习生开心？骂你导师最开心吧哈哈哈
